1696250.name: Purvis Beer VR
1696250.description:
We are passionate about making VR shopping real. We have created an experience that showcases the future of online shopping by buying beer in an immersive space.

In this experience you will begin in a bland, greyed out shop, once you grab the beer can you will be transformed to a desert space where you can interact with a learn about all the beers that are featured in the shop. We see this an a platform for people to see what is possible and dream up their own ideas based off it.

At the moment this experience allows you to checkout your cart (only available in Australia) using your phone.

We believe that shopping has evolved and this an example of what is to come.
1696250.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
